tools.name: Bridge Live-Load Analysis
tools.notes: Simple and continuous-span envelopes for truck, tandem, and lane-pattern loading with AASHTO variable spacing support.

tools.name: RC Tee Beam Load Rating
tools.notes: RC tee-beam LRFR/LFR/ASR rating with deterioration sensitivity and detailed rebar/stirrup loss handling.

tools.name: CMP Culvert Load Rating
tools.notes: Fill-height sweep for circular CMP culverts with ring compression, bending, buckling, seam, and serviceability checks plus explicit steel/rebar/prestress section-loss modeling (baseline vs deteriorated).

tools.name: Composite Steel Girder Rating
tools.notes: Composite section-property, strength, and rating workflow including staged loads and section-loss checks.

tools.name: Prestressed Cored Slab Rating
tools.notes: Prestressed cored slab rating with strand layout/debond handling and deterioration-aware flexure/shear checks.

tools.name: Curved Steel Girder MDX Software Input Tool
tools.notes: Deterministic curved-girder station geometry with MDX Software ASCII input export/import round-trip, golden-byte fixture checks, 2D preview, and deterioration metadata handoff.

tools.name: AASHTO Type III Prestressed Girder Rating
tools.notes: Supports LRFR/LFR/ASR with baseline vs deteriorated sensitivity and explicit section-loss inputs.

tools.name: RC Flat Slab Bridge Load Rating
tools.notes: One-way strip equivalent RC flat slab rating with inventory/operating RFs, varying-width CFRP strip retrofit support, and explicit rebar/steel/prestress deterioration handling.

tools.name: Steel Girder Rating
tools.notes: Rolled-shape and plate-girder rating workflow with section-loss and limit-state checks.
